title: rottlera zollingeri
intro: Rottlera zollingeri, also known as the Indian root or the Kutki plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Celastraceae. It is a traditional medicinal plant used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine, known for its potential in treating various health conditions due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Rottlera zollingeri include its potential to improve digestion, reduce stress and anxiety, and support liver function. Rottlera zollingeri is typically prepared as a powder or decoction and consumed as a herbal remedy in the form of capsules, tablets, or tea.
